title: Predictive Mapping of Vineyard Post-Fire Dynamics Using ExG-Supervised U-Net and Ultra-High-Resolution RGB UAV Imagery
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un enfoque basado en U-Net supervisado con índice ExG (Excess Green) para mapear y predecir la dinámica de recuperación de viñedos después de incendios usando imágenes UAV RGB de ultra alta resolución.
abstract: Post-fire vegetation recovery monitoring is crucial for agricultural land management. This paper presents an ExG-supervised U-Net approach for predictive mapping of vineyard post-fire dynamics using ultra-high-resolution RGB UAV imagery. Our method combines vegetation index supervision with deep learning segmentation to accurately track vineyard recovery patterns after wildfire events, enabling precision agriculture interventions.

citations.apa: Domínguez-Rull, J., Rodrigo-Comino, J., & Herrera, F. (2026). Predictive Mapping of Vineyard Post-Fire Dynamics Using ExG-Supervised U-Net and Ultra-High-Resolution RGB UAV Imagery. In 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI).
citations.mla: Domínguez-Rull, J., J. Rodrigo-Comino, and F. Herrera. "Predictive Mapping of Vineyard Post-Fire Dynamics Using ExG-Supervised U-Net and Ultra-High-Resolution RGB UAV Imagery." 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI), 2026.
